title: 03479_Cross-Modal_Fine-Tuning_Align_then_Refine
positive_examples: Effective cross-modal fine-tuning could have immense impact on less-studied areas, such as physical and life sciences, healthcare, and finance.
Applying models pretrained in data-rich modalities to new problems can potentially alleviate modeling and data concerns, reducing the human effort needed to develop high-quality task-specific models.
